title: TechTerrain
description: Ever wanted a tech modpack with a beautiful world gen? look no further than this modpack.
body:
# Premise 

**Ever wanted a tech modpack with a beautiful world gen? look no further than this modpack.**

This modpack is tech orianted and aims to give you a beautiful world to build in using **Tectonic** and **Williams Wythers Overhauled Overworld**.

Using mods like **Ender IO**, **Mekanism** and **Create** and their addons. 
Storage mods like **Functional Storage** and **Applied Energistics 2** and their addons. 

other mods to make the world be more beautfiul like **YUNG's Mods - Better EVERYTHING**. 

The world can get really flat sometimes SO why want you build a city on it with **MineColonies**, make the plains into your city

few honorable mentions are simple mods like 
**Just Hammers** let you mine with better effecincy. 
**Immersive Aircraft**, **Immersive Machinery**, **Small Ships**. The world is bigger so you need better transportion. 

Many Quality of Life mods like **Mouse Tweaks**, **Client Sort**, **Gravestone Mod**, **Just Zoom**, **Easy Piglins and Easy Villagers**

The modpack is still evolving so keep it in mind. most of the current mods will stay. I'll advise you to check the changelog of each iteration. 

**Custom Questline** underwork on the curseforge page.
